spec.length_desc: 10-15 turns total, includes history-taking and exam

transcript:
HCP: good morning, how are you feeling today?
Patient: hi doctor, actually a bit tired and my knee is really bothering me
HCP: i see, and when did this start?
Patient: maybe two weeks ago, i was walking to the shops and it just gave out on me
HCP: that sounds frustrating, let me check your medical notes
Patient: sure, thanks
HCP: right, so you have a bit of asthma and use ventolin occasionally
Patient: yes, just for the dust or when i get a cold
HCP: ok, and regarding the knee, does it hurt when you climb stairs?
Patient: yes definitely, especially going up, and it feels a bit swollen too
HCP: i understand, let me look at it, yes there is some redness and warmth
Patient: oh that's not good
HCP: not ideal, we need to rule out a tear or inflammation
Patient: i'm worried i might need surgery
HCP: don't worry yet, i think we should get a second opinion first
Patient: that would be nice, who do you think?
HCP: i'd like to refer you to Orthopaedics for a proper assessment
Patient: great, thanks doctor
HCP: i will send the letter today, they'll call you back soon
Patient: excellent, thank you so much

reason.text: knee pain and swelling for 2 weeks

history.evidence_span: you have a bit of asthma
does it hurt when you climb stairs

request.evidence_span: refer you to Orthopaedics for a proper assessment
